renewalOption: Tenant shall have two (2) options to extend the Lease, each for an additional five (5) year term, at 95% of then-current market rate for comparable Lakeview retail. Each option must be exercised by written notice delivered no later than 180 days prior to lease expiration.

property.description: Street-level retail unit in a mixed-use building in the Lakeview neighborhood of Chicago. Features 22-foot frontage with two display windows, 12-foot ceiling height, exposed brick interior, private restroom, and direct access to basement storage. HVAC system recently replaced (2023). Grease trap and Type I hood installed for food service operations. High pedestrian traffic location near the CTA Brown Line Diversey stop.

utilities: Landlord provides (included in rent): Water, sewer, trash. Tenant responsibility: Electricity (ComEd), gas (Peoples Energy), internet, telephone, janitorial services, grease trap maintenance.
petsAllowed: No — Commercial retail space; no live animals except as part of approved business operations with written consent.
